series_metadata.series_description: Databases and logs created for convenience of tracking data and information associated with Labor Relations. Records may include: Discipline Database Log containing information and statistical data relating to issuance of discipline and maintains history; New Hire Orientation Log used to track completion of orientation materials from new employees; Probationary Evaluation Log used to track probationary dates; and, any other database or log created by the section for tracking purposes.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: most current log is maintained on a permanent basis. old log when information is updated, superceded or becomes obsolete. ; Electronic: most current log is maintained on a permanent basis. old log when information is updated, superceded or becomes obsolete
